name: help
description: Lists all available tools with descriptions and usage examples.

name: fetch_pbi
description: Retrieves title, acceptance criteria, and status of an Azure DevOps PBI.

params.id: The numeric PBI ID from Azure DevOps

name: pbi_test_sync
description: Full QA pipeline — fetches PBI context, syncs Test Plan, Suite, and Test Cases to Azure DevOps. Without test_cases it returns PBI details only. With test_cases it creates/updates the full plan.

params.test_cases: (Optional) Array of test cases with title and steps

name: install_qa_skill
description: Installs the BEEF QA protocol as a Cursor skill (.cursor/skills/qa.mdc) in the current project. Enables the 'tp [ID]' shorthand for automated test generation.

name: pbi_test_plan
description: Fetches the full test plan linked to a PBI — plan ID, suite, all test cases with IDs and titles, and a direct Azure URL.

name: validate_sync
description: Fetches a Test Plan from Azure and verifies all test cases landed with steps populated.

params.plan_id: The Azure DevOps Test Plan ID

name: plan_inspect
description: Fetches full test plan details directly by Plan ID — suites, all test cases with IDs and titles, and a direct Azure URL.

params.plan_id: The Azure DevOps Test Plan ID

name: delete_plan
description: Permanently deletes a Test Plan from Azure DevOps by Plan ID. Irreversible. Requires confirm: true.

params.plan_id: The Azure DevOps Test Plan ID to delete
params.confirm: Must be true to proceed. Safety guard against accidental deletion.
